ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol of the company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date the company went public */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the stock price data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the given date */,
  "dividends" REAL /* Dividends issued on the given date */,
  "stock_splits" REAL /* Number of stock splits on the given date */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price, accounting for dividends and stock splits */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the stock */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* After-market price of the stock */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) of the stock */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price from the previous day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the stock price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator entry */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock price data the indicator is calculated from */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of the technical indicator (e.g., SMA, RSI, Bollinger Bands) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date the indicator was calculated */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period over which the indicator is calculated */,
  "indicator_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the technical indicator */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the technical indicator data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data entry */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the external data (e.g., economic indicator, news article) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the external data */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date the data is relevant to */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value or content of the external data */,
  "data_url" TEXT /* URL to the source of the external data */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the external data */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Score indicating the relevance of the data to the stock market */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the external data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the external data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_data_association" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the data is relevant to */,
  "relevance_date" TEXT /* Date the data is relevant to the company */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data association */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Score indicating the relevance of the data to the specific company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_data_association_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_data_association_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES external_data ("data_id")
)
